## What you are requesting

An AI Landing Zone instance is a ready-to-use Azure environment for building, testing, and operating AI solutions. The baseline gives you access to Microsoft Foundry so you can create AI projects, work with models, and start building agent or application scenarios.

You can also request complementary Azure services if your use case needs search, storage, monitoring, security, or data capabilities.

## Request summary

Briefly describe what you want to use this AI Landing Zone instance for.

Example: "I need a proof-of-concept environment to build and evaluate a customer support agent using Microsoft Foundry."

## Request type

Select the option that best describes your request:

- [ ] I have a specific AI use case
- [ ] I am exploring AI Landing Zone capabilities and do not have a specific use case yet
- [ ] I need an environment for a proof of concept
- [ ] I need an environment for production planning

## Use case

Describe the AI use case, workload, or scenario you want to support.

If you are only exploring, describe what you want to learn, test, or validate.

## Business case

Describe the business value, opportunity, or problem this request addresses. A short summary is enough.

Examples:

- Reduce manual effort or operational cost
- Improve customer or employee experience
- Accelerate product development
- Validate a new AI capability
- Support a strategic customer or internal initiative

## Success criteria

What outcomes would make this AI Landing Zone instance successful? Replace the examples below with your own criteria if known.

- [ ] Criteria 1
- [ ] Criteria 2
- [ ] Criteria 3

## Timeline

When do you need the landing zone available? Estimates are fine.

- Target start date:
- Target end date or review date:
- Is this time-sensitive? Yes / No

## Environment details

Provide any known environment details. Leave fields blank if you do not know them yet.

- App ID / Application ID:
- Azure subscription:
- Environment type: Sandbox / Proof of concept / Non-production / Production
- Expected users or teams:

## Complementary services to Microsoft Foundry

The baseline AI Landing Zone gives you access to Microsoft Foundry. Select any additional services you may need for your solution:

- [ ] AI Search / vector search
- [ ] Storage account
- [ ] Cosmos DB
- [ ] Application Insights / monitoring
- [ ] Key Vault
- [ ] Unsure / need guidance

## Data and security considerations

Share any data, compliance, networking, or access requirements we should know about. If you are unsure, mark the fields as `Unknown`.

- Data classification:
- Sensitive or regulated data: Yes / No / Unknown
- Private endpoint required: Yes / No / Unknown
- Required user or group access:
- Compliance requirements:

## Additional details

Add any helpful links, architecture notes, customer context, related issues, or supporting material.
